Class DRDesignHyperlinkComponent

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.component.DRDesignComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.component.DRDesignHyperlinkComponent
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIDesignComponent, DRIDesignHyperLinkComponent, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
DRDesignChart, DRDesignImage, DRDesignTextField
public abstract class DRDesignHyperlinkComponent extends DRDesignComponent implements DRIDesignHyperLinkComponent

Abstract DRDesignHyperlinkComponent class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
